70010000120327.description:
Cozy Bay Hike is a relaxing exploration game where you wander across a charming island, uncovering every hidden location at your own pace. There are no enemies, no timers, and no pressure — just you, the breeze, and a beautifully crafted world waiting to be discovered.

Features:
> Peaceful island exploration
> Discover hidden locations
> Complete your discovery journal
> Relaxing atmosphere & soundtrack
> Simple, cosy gameplay
70010000120327.intro: Welcome to your next peaceful adventure.
70010000120327.name: Cozy Bay Hike

70010000120561.description:
Jump across unlikely platforms, balance on crazy objects, and prove that feline curiosity truly has no limits.

Collect coins along the way and unlock new cats to customize your adventure. Beware of ghosts that may attack you along the path.

The real challenge? Stay calm, calculate every jump, and prove that no obstacle is too great for a cat!
70010000120561.intro: Take control of a fearless cat on a vertical journey, always upward.
70010000120561.name: Cat-up!

70070000035210.description:
Enjoy your short life as a hot dog playing SOLO or with FRIENDS! (up to 8 players)

This edition includes:
- base game with 150 deadly levels and tasty powerups
- fresh sausage pack of 3 new skins (Beekeeper, Firefly, Toxic)

Choose your sausage and run for your life! This race is a hot dog’s dream - or nightmare - depending on how well you do.
70070000035210.intro: The most exciting sausage race in the world! Let the bodies hit the floor in a ketchup bath!
70070000035210.name: Run Sausage Run!: Poison Edition

70070000035308.description:
Have you got what it takes to dodge all the obstacles and outpace the competition? Time to find out!

RECEIVE PREMIUM NOMS AND EXTRA GOLD
Leave the competition in the dust using new content:
- Viking Nom who triggers a powerful long turbo boost shortly after the race begins!
- Wind Nom who gives a big running speed boost to keep you ahead!
- Droid Nom who triggers a medium turbo boost a few seconds after the race starts!
- Iron Nom who gives you a 30-second shield right at the start!
- Electro Nom who eliminates one other runner!
- Goldie Nom who gets more exp than any other Nom!
- X Nom who gives you a big boost when climbing and running on walls!
- Visor Nom who eliminates two other racers right at the start of the race!
- 8000 gold to buy new Noms!

NEW MULTIPLAYER MODE FOR UP TO 4 PLAYERS!
Grab friends or family and jump into the same race on one screen. Chase the lead, pull off last-second comebacks, and see who really is the fastest runner among you!

RACE THROUGH EXCITING LOCATIONS
Embark on a heart-pounding journey as you dash through thrilling and challenging locations full of traps and setbacks that will test your skills to the limit.

AVOID AND DODGE OBSTACLES
Navigate through the course with lightning speed, skillfully avoiding and dodging obstacles that stand between you and victory. Show off your reflexes and maneuver your way to success!

BE THE FIRST TO COMPLETE THE RACE
Race to be the first to cross the finish line! Feel the adrenaline rush as you outpace your opponents and emerge victorious. It’s not just a race; it’s a quest for glory!

FIND THE FASTEST ROUTES TO VICTORY
With thousands of possible paths, the choice is yours! Strategize and discover the fastest routes to secure your place at the top. Unleash your inner speed demon and leave your competition in the dust!

Get ready for an omtastic challenge that will put your speed and skills to the ultimate test.
70070000035308.intro: Ready, set, dash! Join the omtastic Om Nom Run 2 challenge and prove you’re the speedster champion.
70070000035308.name: Om Nom: Run 2 - Emerald Edition

70070000035313.description:
Johnny Trigger - International Man of Mayhem!

This bundle includes:
- Johnny Trigger
- Johnny Trigger: Avenger DLC
- Johnny Trigger: Hunter DLC

Features:
• 2 new skins: Avenger and Hunter
• 2 new weapons: Hurricane and Tri-Shot Bow
• 1500 additional gemms to buy other currencies
• 35000 additional money to buy or draw weapons and skins in shops
• 75 additional puzzles to unlock more comic graphics
• 25 additional keys to open locked doors in base

Stylish, deadly and smooth as a billiard ball, Johnny Trigger is a man on a mission in this non-stop platform shooter game where the action never ends.

Do you have what it takes to bring down the underground world of the mafia?
“Less talk, more bullets” - that’s Johnny’s motto as he runs, jumps, spins, slides and keeps on shooting till every bad guy’s bitten the dust.

Dive straight in and get shooting! Johnny Trigger’s short but immensely satisfying levels make it the perfect action game to fill a short break.
And if you’ve got a little more time, there’s so much to collect and a new challenge round every corner.

So what are you waiting for? Those bad guys aren’t going to beat themselves, you know.
70070000035313.intro: Looking for definitive action? Here’s Johnny!
70070000035313.name: Johnny Trigger: Gold Edition

70010000120310.description:
Travel the world in this cozy hidden-object adventure inspired by real cities like Tokyo, Paris, Rio, and Venice. 

Explore charming hand-drawn scenes, relax, decorate, and discover hidden treasures across iconic destinations.

Features

- Explore iconic cities from around the world in cozy, hand-drawn scenes
- Find hidden objects and complete relaxing missions at your own pace
- Decorate charming locations and bring each city to life
Unlock new destinations and collect unique souvenirs
- Create levels to share with the world and play levels made by other players
- Enjoy a peaceful soundtrack and soothing visuals

Slow down and enjoy the simple joy of discovery, one city at a time.
70010000120310.intro: Cozy hidden-object adventure across iconic world cities
70010000120310.name: Hidden around the World

70010000093311.description:
The classic shooter/RPG is back and better than ever! Featuring a unique mix of side-scrolling shoot-'em-up space battles and top-down planetary exploration, Sigma Star Saga DX is an explosive genre mashup that lets you take control of Allied Earth Federation pilot Ian Recker and infiltrate the alien Krill Empire as a double agent in a last-ditch effort to save mankind. 

With loyalties divided between humans and Krill, you must investigate six planets using an ever-expanding set of tools and abilities, and jump into the cockpit to engage enemy forces in intense shmup-style combat using more than 70 different Gun Data items. Gorgeous pixel-art graphics, epic boss battles, and a twist-filled story with multiple endings await. 

The new DX version adds numerous refinements over the original 2005 release, including an improved map, decreased random encounter rate, rebalanced EXP system, enhanced dialogue, additional save points, assorted bug fixes and quality-of-life updates, and more.

Key Features:
• The handheld classic returns after 20 years!
• Top-down RPG-style exploration mixed with action-packed space-shooter battles!
• Survive as a double agent for the humans and the Krill, and discover the secret of the six planets
• Stunning pixel-art graphics and fantastic soundtrack
• Explore using tools like the Scanner, Krill Boots, Wings, and more
• Customize your ship with more than 70 different Gun Data items yielding 15,000+ combinations
• Branching story with multiple endings
• The definitive DX version adds an improved map, decreased random encounter rate, rebalanced EXP system, updated script, various bug fixes, and other enhancements
70010000093311.intro: Half shoot-'em-up, half RPG! Blast through an intergalactic genre mashup!
70010000093311.name: Sigma Star Saga DX

70010000101011.description:
Eko and the Bewitched Lands: Rescue, Survive, Repeat!

Master the Elements and Defy the Dark Queen!
Princess in peril? Best friend kidnapped? It’s just another Tuesday for Eko. Dive into a charming yet ruthless world where your reflexes are your best ally. Eko and the Bewitched Lands blends fast-paced action with deep roguelike strategy, ensuring no two rescue missions are ever the same.

Adapt or Perish
Why play the same way twice? Discover a massive arsenal of weapons, mystical artifacts, and game-changing abilities. Will you become a whirlwind of steel, or a strategic mastermind using the environment to crush your foes? The choice isn’t just about style—it’s about survival.

High-Stakes Exploration
The Bewitched Lands are alive and ever-changing. Uncover ancient relics that grant god-like power... or trigger a deadly curse. Every corner hides a secret, and every secret is a gamble. Do you dare to decipher the runes?

Why you’ll love it:
- Adrenaline-Fueled Combat: Master the perfect dodge and unleash devastating elemental combos (Fire, Water, and beyond!).
- Infinite Variety: Randomly generated layouts and hundreds of upgrade combinations mean a fresh challenge every run.
- Brain & Brawn: It's not just about hitting hard; use puzzle-solving skills and the environment to outsmart the Dark Queen’s minions.
- Charming Chaos: Experience a magical, vibrant atmosphere that hides a punishing, rewarding difficulty curve.
70010000101011.intro: Help Eko rescue the Princess (and his best friend!) from the Dark Queen in this charming, fast-paced roguelike action RPG!
70010000101011.name: Eko and the Bewitched Lands

70010000119331.description:
A voice is saying your name. A WWII-era machine, long hidden in a church basement, whirs to life. Through a crackling speaker, a man asks you to find a stolen book. He only knows the title. Time is running out.

The machine, created by Bletchley Park engineers Cecil Caulderly and Beatrice Dooler, contains a vast archive of obscure books, letters, and journals fed in over the span of fifty years in an attempt to crack the code of reality. As their lives fell apart, the machine kept working.

Navigate the computer’s archive. Link its obscure texts and uncover its creators’ secrets. Communicate with the man behind the speaker to figure out your role in this mystery. Destroy the book at the core of the machine — before it’s too late.

NARRATIVE DEDUCTION

• Deduce links through the archive to locate hidden sources.

• Unravel the stories and unearth the secrets of the books’ authors and the machine's creators.

• Map the archive and find the book that will rewrite the world.

INTERACTIVE AUDIO DRAMA

• Talk with your handler at any time, creating a dynamic audio drama that responds as you explore.

• Featuring the voices of Rebekah McLoughlin, Paul Warren and Phillipe Bosher.

• Original soundtrack by Laurence Chapman.

Written and created by the award-winning team behind Heaven's Vault, Overboard!, and A Highland Song.
70010000119331.intro: A World War II computer. An archive of lost books. A world-changing secret. Narrative deduction meets audio drama, from the creators of Heaven's Vault.
70010000119331.name: TR-49

70010000004515.description: Enjoy traditional Pokémon battles using familiar mechanics such as Pokémon Types, abilities, and moves, enabling rich and varied battle strategies that Trainers know and love.
70010000004515.intro: Pokémon Champions is coming to Nintendo Switch!
70010000004515.name: Pokémon Champions

70010000105658.description:
Our planet is under attack from the Star Spores, and they've warped life on Earth into ferocious uber-bugs.

Even worse, a nasty alien has made its new home directly attached to your head.

But it's not all bad news - your new best friend has provided both the strength to fight back against the mutated horde, and control over a weapon that can tip the balance of the battle in humanity's favor: the ChainStaff.

As you traverse the surreal landscape, you'll encounter your fellow soldiers, stranded in harsh environments. Do you rescue your comrades or listen to the alien voice in your head and harvest them for upgrades?

If you can persevere and defeat the Star Spores, perhaps you can save everyone…including yourself."
GAME FEATURES
MASTER THE CHAINSTAFF
Hurl it as a spear and slice aliens in half. Throw it to the ground as a shield to stop incoming attacks. Grapple and swing on just about anything. The transforming ChainStaff does all this and more, and all with one button, it’s all up to you.
YOU DIED
Pounded to mush, stabbed through the heart, sheared in two. Prepare to meet your doom in a myriad of disgusting ways. All deaths are avoidable, but some dangers may require special strategies.
FEROCIOUS FOES
The creatures of Earth have been mutated by aliens: you’ll come across dozens of unusual creatures, and once you get past those, you’ll have to fight against screen-filling monstrosities.
GROTESQUE UPGRADES
Stranded soldiers dot the landscape of ChainStaff. You must choose whether to rescue them or devour their organs; each option has unique benefits and will lead to different endings.
10 WILD LEVELS
"Mist trails through rocky crags.
Wind blows over icy, moon-lit hills.
Water streams down mossy cliffs.
Fully hand-drawn art immerses you in a living world inspired by album covers of the 70s and 80s."
KILLER SOUNDTRACK
"Scorching riffs and peals of thunder. Pumping beats drive you ever forward.
Rock out to the classic metal soundtrack by the award-winning composer Deon van Heerden of Broforce and Warhammer 40k: Shootas Blood & Teef soundtrack fame. There’s some lighter interludes with 70s synth, catchy melodies, and even some cowbell. Now it’s back to the heavy tracks, where it’s time to bang your head while smashing skulls.

All depictions of violence are 2 dimensional and heavily stylized. As part of your quest to cleanse Earth of the Star Spore menace, you'll use all the weapons at your disposal to defeat your foes, many of whom will die bloody deaths. Additionally, you may harvest resources from your fellow soldiers in order to increase the power of the alien keeping you alive, and this process is messy.
70010000105658.intro: ChainStaff is a brutal action-platformer with a transforming spear and grappling hook, blazing weapon upgrades, and a rocking soundtrack.
70010000105658.name: ChainStaff

70010000110455.description:
Immerse yourself in the chilling tale of the Chen Family Village, where a mother searching for her missing daughter accidentally stumbles into a haunted place filled with mysterious cults. Guide Jia Jun Lee as she searches a village and pieces together fragile clues to her loved one’s whereabouts, carefully hiding her movements as supernatural threats close in from all sides.

Incantation is a first-person horror-themed adventure game adapted from the live action film of the same name. Beyond the palpable madness and fear in the village, there's a sinister force that drives one to despair. What happens when one crosses the forbidden line of this evil deity?

Perform rituals, solve puzzles, collect documents and hunt for key items to access new areas of the village, all in hopes of finding your missing daughter and escaping alive!

• Explore a remote village that harbors evil secrets and worships malicious spirits!
• Search for clues to your missing daughter’s whereabouts while evading your pursuers.
• Unravel an eerie ritual and discover its deep secrets!
• Solve environmental puzzles and collect key items to gain access to new areas.
• Enjoy an immersive cinematic experience inspired by Taiwanese culture and traditions!
70010000110455.intro: Brave the darkness of a haunted village in hopes of finding a lost loved one!
70010000110455.name: Incantation

70010000079798.description:
“SHIKA-Q” is an ultra-fast competitive puzzle game where players connect “Links” on a 10×10 board, and victory or defeat is decided in an instant.

The board evolves in real time as attacks, interference, recovery, and special moves unfold simultaneously. With barely a moment to think, players must constantly decide their next move, creating intense tension and speed.

Unlike traditional falling-block puzzle games, blocks do not drop from above. The board begins reacting the moment you place a piece. Because it is a real-time competitive system, players must not only connect Links but also read their opponent’s intentions—creating mind games similar to those found in fighting games.

Every decision directly impacts the outcome. Both strategic thinking and reflexes are essential. Momentum shifts rapidly, and the game state is visually clear, making it exciting not only to play but also to watch—an ideal fit for esports.

The game’s defining feature is its Music.

Vocal tracks and high-energy songs amplify the intensity of battle. Rather than serving as simple background music, the vocal tracks integrate with gameplay flow, directly enhancing tension and momentum. Music, play, and emotion synchronize to create an unprecedented level of immersion.

Game Features
■ Strategy ×Super Speed × Competitive Play (1–2 Players)

Connect Links on a 10×10 board as offense and defense unfold in real time. Instant decisions determine victory.

Custom settings allow players to adjust the balance between speed and strategy—from slower, thought-focused matches to ultra-high-speed battles.

In addition to Offline Versus, the game also supports Online Battles and Ranked Matches, where split-second judgment determines the winner against players worldwide.

■ Challenge Mode (Single-Player)

A world-ranking-supported solo mode fully synchronized with music.

As stages progress, both the music and gameplay evolve. Manage your health, balance offense and defense, clear all 99 stages, and aim for a high score.

Unlike Versus Mode, this mode emphasizes discovering the optimal solution for each situation.

■ Characters, Worldbuilding & Customization

A diverse cast of characters enhances the competitive experience through unique themes and presentation.

Customize UI design, music, emotes, loading screens, wallpapers, icons, and more to personalize your matches.

Each theme includes dedicated character songs, deepening both musical and narrative immersion.

Tailor the atmosphere to your playstyle and express yourself through battle presentation.

■ DLC Battle Pass – Expanding the Online Experience

The DLC Battle Pass unlocks rewards progressively through mission completion.

It includes premium customization content such as UI designs, music, emotes, loading screens, wallpapers, and icons—enhancing the competitive experience.

The more you play, the more your presentation evolves. Your progress remains visible, supporting a long-term online experience built on growth and achievement.
70010000079798.name: SHIKA-Q

70010000081475.description:
FROGGONIT is a cute adventure-exploration game set on an island full of friendly animals.

The problem is (there’s always something, isn’t there?) that you accidentally summoned a villain who covered the entire island in darkness!

The good thing is that you are a frog obsessed with secrets and discoveries, so this is your chance to be a hero and save everyone!

(You don’t really have a choice).

GAMEPLAY:
EXPLORE - Every single room is filled with secrets and ready to be rediscovered.
DANCE - Out of context!
HOP - Reach awkward places! (But please don't break the game)
RIBBIT - Use it to startle your friends! (It also works as a hint system)
PLAY MINI GAMES - I got a bit carried away and made over 40!

FEATURES:
Pixelated 2D sprites in 3D environments
Explore an island full of hidden secrets
Help your animal friends!
Solve puzzles to unlock new areas
Play over 40 mini-games! 
Dance with everyone!
Dedicated RIBBIT button!
Hop everywhere!
Take selfies!
Original soundtrack
4th-wall breaking
Lots of humor!
70010000081475.intro: FROGGONIT was trying to be the best explorer but accidentally covered the island with darkness! Hop into this comedy adventure game full of secrets and restore the light!
70010000081475.name: FROGGONIT

70010000097867.description:
A Skautfold Story

Return to the Lovecraftian nightmare of the Angelic Empire of Britannia as Gray, the 2nd Knight, sent on a diplomatic mission to the Dawn Empire of Japan. The mission immediately goes horribly wrong as Lunatic cultists instigate a religious coup, putting the Japanese Emperor and Eleanor's envoys at risk. Your task? Explore the Oda Imperial Palace, negotiate with its factions, and secure the survival of the Empire!

The story follows the events of Shrouded in Sanity, Usurper, and Into the Fray, as the Skautfold series is heading to its conclusion. Knowledge of the previous games is not required to enjoy the game, but it will most certainly make it even more enjoyable.

A Tight-knit Metroidvania

Pick your path and your battles. The world's semi-open design allows you to forge your own way to your objective, learning shortcuts and loops as you piece together the dark secrets of the Imperial Family and its first God Emperor.

Take on bosses in any order you please. Safe heavens, familiars and Relics will allow you to grow your power and return to past areas. Along the way, tend to dying soldiers, collect Yth stones, discover ninja pugs hidden in plain sight, and dart around the Eldritch horrors posing as innocent treasures!


And Explosive Combat!

Fight for your life with an overhauled Guard System featuring perfect blocks and well-timed dodges. Careless actions will snowball as health damage affects your maximum guard, but it goes both ways: punish your enemies or be punished yourself!

Waltham Industry's Vitae Injections will allow you to recover or even overcharge your health, buffing your damage and allowing you to tank troublesome attacks.


When everything goes awry and the Moon looms above, will you save the Empire or fall to Eldritch cultists?
70010000097867.intro: When everything goes awry and the Moon opens, will you save the Empire or fall to Eldritch cultists?
70010000097867.name: Skautfold: Moonless Knight

70010000103012.description:
Seven years after the dramatic events in Anemone Valley, the political situation surrounding magic has reached boiling point within the Empire. At the Seven Winds Academy, however, life goes on undisturbed by outside influences. Here, the students’ biggest worries are exams, job prospects, and who might be taking whom to the New Year’s Gala, but when a curious group of seniors stumble upon a secret hidden within the castle, their priorities for the year change in an instant…

Explore a brand new adventure as a mage student of the Seven Winds Academy and experience a story that can be enjoyed by new and returning players of the series. Choose from three different magical disciplines, and let your choices shape the personality of your character as you navigate school life during a time of great change.

As you uncover the story of Arcadia Fallen II, you will decide how you respond to the people around you and the events that unfold. Tone labels help you avoid unexpected consequences, and choices with significant impact on the story are highlighted. But no matter what you decide to do, there are no “wrong” choices and no dead ends. Only you can find the path that is right for you.

Your chosen magical discipline will affect your character's upbringing, what locations they are familiar with, and what skills they bring to the team. This and more will influence puzzles throughout the game and challenge you in different ways depending on the choices you make in each playthrough.

No true boarding school experience is complete without a bit of rule-breaking! Sneak out at night with your friends and discover the secrets the old castle holds. If you’re daring, you might pick up some juicy gossip as well.
70010000103012.intro: Choose from three different magical disciplines, and let your choices shape the personality of your character as you navigate school life during a time of great change
70010000103012.name: Arcadia Fallen II

70010000103228.description:
A century after the legendary artist Orwiel vanished, Sion and Michelle begin a journey to uncover his final works. Along the way, they encounter Liara, a mysterious girl who has lost her memories. What she carries holds the power to alter their path and entwine their fates, drawing the party into a story of art, destiny, and hidden truths in a classic fantasy world.

This classic command-based JRPG features a 3D isometric map interface and smooth, dynamic battle animations. Explore dungeons and engage in easy-to-learn turn-based combat inspired by old-school RPGs. Enhance weapons at the blacksmith, learn up to five skills per character, and strengthen those skills through repeated use as their power and effects evolve. Build the SP gauge during battle to unleash powerful special abilities, and expend it all at once to trigger devastating combo attacks with your allies.
70010000103228.intro: Explore isometric dungeons and master evolving skills in a classic JRPG
70010000103228.name: Tears Revolude

70010000104937.description:
This game is a drone simulation game that allows you to experience real drone flight based on footage shot by a real flying drone. 
There is no up, down, left or right direction control, only the control to increase or decrease the drone speed. 
You can also change the drone's flight mode from Normal, Sport, and Eco to any of the 3. 

Enjoy the beautiful scenery of Hujeong Auditorium, Korea with "Real" footage! 
There are a total of 2 flight courses in 1 areas.
High-definition footage faithfully reproduces the atmosphere of real nature, providing a strong sense of immersion in the game. 
Smooth and realistic video playback makes you feel like you are a real drone pilot. 
Large capacity! You can fly to locations that show the beautiful scenery of Korea! 
Two play modes are supported: course-specific flying mode and view mode automatic flight. There is also an achievement system. 
Visit Korea from home at any time! 
Enjoy the drone flight control experience and the beautiful natural scenery. MasCon for Nintendo Switch™ made by Zuiki of Japan is also supported.
70010000104937.name: Korean Drone Flying Tour Hujeong Auditorium

70010000105625.description:
Step into a world where love, temptation, and fate collide.

A mysterious demon appears before you with a chilling challenge: win the heart of your university professor… or be dragged into the depths of hell.

As your conversations grow more intimate, your every word shapes your destiny.

Will you follow the demon’s wicked game, or defy him and choose your own path?

Your choices matter... and every ending reveals a different truth about desire, freedom, and the price of love.


Features:

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: Every path leads to a different fate. And a different version of you.

● CHOICE & CONSEQUENCE: What you say changes everything, even who survives.

● SUPERNATURAL ROMANCE: A love story twisted by temptation, mystery, and desire.

● ATMOSPHERIC EXPERIENCE: Stunning art and haunting music that draw you into the dark.


It’s seductive.
It’s dangerous.
It’s your soul on the line.

Are you ready to play her game?
70010000105625.intro:
What if the price of love… was your soul?
Make your choice… before it’s made for you.
70010000105625.name: Anime School Love: Her Teacher's Secret Lesson

70010000106830.description:
This game requires a good level of understanding of the English language in order to play.
 
Beyond Words
The genre-defining fusion of roguelike strategy and word-crafting. Build powerful combos, unlock upgrades, and master a challenge where victory is spelled one letter at a time.
 
 Build powerful word combos, unlock game-changing upgrades and journey through a living puzzle shaped by your decisions. Every choice, every letter, every placement matters.
 
 It's Time To Spell!
 Play your own way by switching up letter scores, duplicating the ones you love and destroying the ones you don’t. Bend the rules past breaking point with modifiers, stickers, and enhancements where every choice shapes your journey. Think your way through seemingly impossible situations or pick up the pace and go fast and frantic with optional time-attack boards. 
 
 Evolve and Adapt 
 Over 300 unique modifiers and abilities — supercharged tile types, booster cards, power cards, pickups & perks.
 
 Endless combinations bring surprise and opportunity for your creative strategies. It’s all about synergies, combos, and clever play — where every decision can dramatically alter the course of a run. As you progress, your expanding toolbox rewards you with new possibilities every time you play.
 
 Master Challenges
 Each board is a unique puzzle where your words matter. Shifting rules, layouts and objectives keep you adapting in an evolving tactical space. Be a friend to your future self - plan ahead, create routes to powerful pickups and think like a strategist setting up devastating power-scoring combos for that perfect chef’s-kiss word play.
 
 Bosses with Bite
 Overcome 30+ unique Boss challenges that twist the rules in devious ways. When you’re ready to push further, take on time attacks, seeded runs or the brain-melting flipside of negative scoring. Escalating targets and endless play mean there’s always an opportunity to flex your skills in gratifying challenges which demonstrate your level of mastery.
 
 Instantly Playable, Infinitely Replayable
 Easy to pick up thanks to familiar word-tile mechanics while incredibly rewarding to master, welcoming both casual players and hardcore strategists. Whether you’re chasing the highest scores, experimenting with outrageous synergies or simply relaxing into the rhythm of letters and logic - Beyond Words is a playground for endless discovery where every word counts.
70010000106830.intro: Beyond Words is a genre-defining fusion of roguelike strategy and word-crafting.
70010000106830.name: Beyond Words

70010000110930.description:
The Confinement is an FP4 (First Person Paced Precision Platformer) that combines speed, precision, and reflexes in an extremely challenging parkour experience. You are trapped in a simulation created by the artificial intelligence AmokAI, where every move could be your last.

Run, dodge, jump, and dash as you navigate narrow corridors, suspended platforms, and deadly traps in a hostile, technological environment. Each level is designed to test your skill, your quick reading of the scenario, and your ability to improvise under pressure.

With around 30 to 40 short and intense stages, each stage encourages constant improvement, challenging you to beat your own times and compete with other players. The combination of fluid movement, intense challenges, and striking surroundings makes The Confinement an ideal experience for those seeking fast action, extreme precision, and high replay value.
70010000110930.intro: The Confinement is a game that puts your skills to the test. Master precise movements, strategic dashes, and challenging courses.
70010000110930.name: The Confinement

70010000111323.description:
Brave Rounds is a fast-paced, close range-heavy vertical scrolling shoot 'em up with the beauty and ruthless precision of 00s arcade classics. Shoot them up by yourself or co-op together with a friend!

Master the art of getting closer and beat the heck out of them!

Play as one of three playable characters accompanied with their Options. Shoot the wide shot, focus shot, deploy the bombs, or unleash their special!

You don't have to fight alone; get a friend and play together in Two Player where they control the Options directly! Or control both characters at once with just one controller with Dual Control!

Brave Rounds tells a touching story of inter-generational relationships and the lengths people take to accomplish their goals. Set in the occult and sci-fi-laden modern era of 20XX, Brave Rounds explores the worth in fighting for what you believe in.

Features:
- Arcade Mode, the game's main mode of high-intensity five stages action. Fight the mid-bosses, bosses, and watch out for the dynamic difficulty: Rank! Are you worthy enough to face the True Last Boss...?
- Stage Practice, for your practicing convenience. Whenever you get stuck at Arcade Mode, visit the Stage Practice.
- Story Mode, telling a different story from Arcade Mode, is where you tackle 41 bite-sized stages. Complete the challenges, get the stars, upgrade your strength. Explore the world of Brave Rounds and the motivations behind the characters in lively and animated Visual Novel-style cutscenes!
- Score Attack. Get the high score in the Score Attack-exclusive stage within the 3 minutes time limit! Dare to put the gas on the pedal and raise the rank to its limit?
- Inspired by 00s video games and animes, Brave Rounds features smooth, hi-res hand-drawn art and animations. Colorful and expressive! Watching their movements is key to success.
- Enjoy the soundtrack of various genres by Dicky Teja Pratama, Jasson Prestiliano and Scowsh!
- Screen scaling options including TATE / Vertical mode, rebindable conrols, and replays!
70010000111323.intro: Shoot, punch and get closer through bullets and enemies in this close range-heavy arcade bullet hell shoot 'em up!
70010000111323.name: Brave Rounds

70010000111766.description:
A table tennis legend meets a rhythm game! Hit every ball precisely in time, keep to the beat and let the rhythm guide your shots. Master Timo Boll's legendary techniques, challenge charismatic rivals in urban locations and create perfect combos. Every shot counts – your sense of rhythm will be crucial!

• 77 songs, 7 genres – pop, hip-hop/RnB, rock, electro, chill-out, country and kids' music
• Professional moves from Timo Boll – train with a world-class player
• Reflexes and timing – focus and stay sharp 
• Combos and hiscores – play a perfect series of shots
• Stylish arenas – industrial areas, train stations and many more
70010000111766.intro: Feel the beat. Hit the ball.
70010000111766.name: Timo Boll Beats

70010000111924.description:
SP(L/R)ITE is an adventure game where you must escape a series of mysterious floating rooms in another dimension.

Uncover the secrets hidden within each room as you collaborate with an unnervingly energetic goddess and a neighbor you can only speak to through the wall.

What lies beyond the final door? That’s for you to decide.

Sp(L/R)ite unfolds within a locked, crumbling house—an isolated, otherworldly space born from an unforeseen tangling of the “threads of fate” spun by Akrida.

To move from one room to the next, you’ll need to gather scattered items and piece together a mysterious picture—the key to your escape—guided by clues from Jean and Akrida.

With each image you complete, Jean’s and your lost memories begin to surface, slowly revealing your intertwined pasts and drawing you closer to the story’s end.

What future lies ahead for you two? That depends on the choices you make.
70010000111924.intro: Together, you’ll unravel the secrets of this surreal space in this adventure game. Which door will you choose—and where will it lead?
70010000111924.name: SP(L/R)ITE

70010000112503.description:
Experience the thrill of victory and step onto the pitch for the most refined edition yet. Football Cup 2026 sets a new standard with smarter AI, enhanced mechanics, and expanded challenge levels designed to push your skills further than ever before. Lead your favorite team to glory and prove you have what it takes to conquer the world’s biggest stadiums.

Choose from a diverse roster of national and club teams, each with distinct strengths and playstyles. Tailor your team to fit your strategy, then take control with a streamlined UI and refined mechanics that make every pass, shot, and tackle feel sharper and more responsive. Improved ball physics and polished gameplay ensure every match is fast, fluid, and intensely satisfying.

More intelligent opponents mean fiercer competition - with upgraded AI and new difficulty modes, the challenge adapts to your skill level. Whether you're just starting out or aiming for total domination, every victory feels earned.

Start your professional football journey and dive into game modes designed to keep the action exciting and rewarding:

- Basic Mode - Learn and master essential football skills.
- Career Mode - Make key strategic decisions and lead your team to long-term success.
- Divisions Mode - Climb the competitive ladder, prove your consistency, and secure your place among the elite.
- Europa, Copa Del Sur, Champions Cup - Compete in prestigious international tournaments and face top-tier opponents from around the world.

Football Cup 2026 delivers faster gameplay, sharper competition, and deeper progression than ever before. The pitch is yours - rise through the divisions, outplay your rivals, and build your legacy in football history.
70010000112503.intro: Lead your nation. Claim the trophy. Become a legend.
70010000112503.name: Football Cup 2026

70010000113482.description: Spot Challenge Vol. 1 is a puzzle game inspired by classic visual comparison challenges, where you compare two images and identify the differences between them. With over 360 differences spread across 35 levels, will you be able to find them all? Perfect for playing solo or with friends and family, Spot Challenge is a fun way to test your attention to detail!
70010000113482.intro: Sharpen your eyes and test your focus in the ultimate spot-the-difference challenge!
70010000113482.name: Spot Challenge Vol. 1

70010000115112.description:
A management simulation in which you take an old, run-down castle and turn it into a dastardly demon stronghold! Recruit unique monsters as your minions and vanquish adventurers who dare to enter your realm!

Install gargoyles, ritual altars, and other devilish decor to boost your castle's mystique and attract more monsters your way. Gift them food and other items to help them grow, and garner their support to fend off pesky adventurers.

You can also send your monster minions out to explore nearby dungeons and towns. They'll bring you back items and other loot, and maybe even some new allies!

As you progress, you can also start merging monsters together to make new ones.

And don't forget traps—essential equipment for proper castle defense! Develop a range of traps like sleep-inducing gas and heavy washbowls to thwart any who cross the threshold of your demonic haven! By placing and combining traps in imaginative ways, you can make your fortress of fiendishness virtually impregnable!

Fend off attacks from mighty adventurers and keep your minions sweet to become the biggest and baddest demon overlord of all time!
70010000115112.intro: Demon Castle Building Dungeon Management Simulation
70010000115112.name: Demon Castle Story

70010000117625.description:
SwooshCat – A precision platformer starring an adorable feline! Master simple jumps and dashes to embark on a challenging yet delightful adventure. 

Slash, Parry, Break, Dodge – Your dash isn't just movement: it's a combat blade and puzzle key!

Explore lush jungles and scorching deserts, each meticulously packed with deadly traps and cunning mechanisms to challenge your skills and strategy!

Turn foes into stepping stones – Chain kills, parries, and dashes to bounce off corpses and bullets, resetting mobility to reach "impossible" corners!

Easy to learn, deep to master: Newbies leap right in; speedrunners face brutal challenges!

Buttery controls + Rich level design = An unmissable catventure!
70010000117625.intro: SwooshCat is a vibrant precision-platformer adventure. Leap, dash, slash, stab, roll, and ricochet your way through a charming pixel world as you help a brave little cat explore and battle!
70010000117625.name: SwooshCat

70010000117802.description:
Step into a new chapter of calm and clever challenges in Legends Align Land of Order, a puzzle where every piece has its place and every decision brings you closer to the perfect solution. Set in refreshed environments full of personality, the goal is simple and satisfying: fit different shapes together until the entire board is complete.

With 30 carefully crafted levels, the game invites you to observe, test, and reorganize ideas without rush or pressure. Each layout offers new possibilities, encouraging creative strategies and that clear moment when everything finally aligns.

Easy to understand and pleasant to play, Legends Align Land of Order offers a relaxing experience for players who enjoy visual puzzles, steady progression, and the rewarding feeling of seeing every piece find its place. It is the kind of challenge that calms the mind while keeping your thinking active.
70010000117802.name: Legends Aligned: Land of Order

70010000119142.description:
Welcome to a maid café where the service is as charming as it is unexpected.

In Maid-Sama Cafe: Anime Boys Services in Cute Outfits, a team of handsome anime boys is ready to serve customers in adorable maid outfits. Behind the smiles, playful teasing, and stylish uniforms lies a café full of energy, fun, and irresistible charm.

Help the boys keep the café running through a series of fast and entertaining minigames. Serve drinks, prepare desserts, and assist the staff as they entertain guests with confidence and personality.

Each boy has his own unique style, attitude, and playful charm. As you improve your scores, you’ll unlock new illustrations and discover more about the cafe’s most charismatic staff members.

Relax, enjoy the atmosphere, and spend time with the cutest maids you never expected.


FEATURES:

● CHARMING MAID BOYS: Meet anime boys in cute maid outfits with unique personalities and playful attitudes.

● FUN MINIGAMES: Complete a variety of fast-paced café minigames based on timing and reflexes.

● UNLOCKABLE GALLERY: Progress through the game to unlock collectible illustrations.

● COLORFUL ANIME STYLE: Expressive characters and vibrant visuals bring the café to life.

● EASY TO PLAY: Simple controls designed for quick and enjoyable sessions.

● HIGH REPLAY VALUE: Improve your scores and unlock all the cafe’s secrets.


The café is open.
Your favourite maid might be a boy.
70010000119142.intro:
The cutest café just got a little more dangerous.
Charming anime boys serving with style.
Are you ready for the sweetest service in town?
70010000119142.name: Maid-Sama Cafe: Anime Boys Services in Cute Outfits

70010000119681.description:
Welcome to a revolutionary puzzle experience where the logic of nonograms meets the artistry of Jigsaw Puzzles. Solid Void - Topsy Turvy World invites you to restore a legendary painting through a unique two-step puzzle adventure, perfect for cozy gaming sessions and mental training.

Unlock a Masterpiece, Two Ways
Each of the 250+ puzzles is a dual-layered challenge. First, engage your logical mind with a satisfying nonogram grid to reveal clues for the second phase where you shift your thinking as you arrange pieces of the image into a cohesive jigsaw to reveal one section of The Topsy Turvy World painting by Pieter Bruegel the Elder. 

Featuring calming music to sooth the mind as you take on increasingly difficult puzzles, Topsy Turvy World ramps up the challenge so that players of all skill levels can test their logic skills. 

With over 250 individual puzzles, players will have plenty to sink their teeth into while constantly working toward the ultimate goal of completing the larger tapestry. Solid Void - Topsy Turvy World is perfect for keeping your brain sharp.

A new puzzle adventure awaits!
70010000119681.intro:
A Fresh Mix Of Classic Nonogram And Jigsaw Puzzles.
Flex your puzzle skills and master nonogram and jigsaw challenges!
70010000119681.name: Solid Void - Topsy Turvy World

70010000120114.description: Meet the sumo wrestlers at the end of each course, so be prepared. Smash him with all your weight and power.
70010000120114.name: Sumo Rumble

70010000120962.description:
A management simulation in which you take an old, run-down castle and turn it into a dastardly demon stronghold! Recruit unique monsters as your minions and vanquish adventurers who dare to enter your realm!

Install gargoyles, ritual altars, and other devilish decor to boost your castle's mystique and attract more monsters your way. Gift them food and other items to help them grow, and garner their support to fend off pesky adventurers.

You can also send your monster minions out to explore nearby dungeons and towns. They'll bring you back items and other loot, and maybe even some new allies!

As you progress, you can also start merging monsters together to make new ones.

And don't forget traps—essential equipment for proper castle defense! Develop a range of traps like sleep-inducing gas and heavy washbowls to thwart any who cross the threshold of your demonic haven! By placing and combining traps in imaginative ways, you can make your fortress of fiendishness virtually impregnable!

Fend off attacks from mighty adventurers and keep your minions sweet to become the biggest and baddest demon overlord of all time!
70010000120962.intro: Demon Castle Building Dungeon Management Simulation
70010000120962.name: Demon Castle Story – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70010000122145.description:
The Train Plus Mini series is here, bringing the fun of the Train Plus series in a more accessible and easy-to-enjoy format.

In this title, you can explore the above-ground section of the Jukyo Metro Big Edo Line, famous for its striking orange line color, and experience the joy of train driving at your own pace.

Choose between two ways to enjoy the game:
In Free Drive Mode, you can operate the train freely and soak in the fun of driving.
In Auto Drive Mode, simply sit back, relax, and enjoy the passing scenery from the train window.

Drive the 10-100 Series, and keep an eye out for the brand-new 10-200 Series, which appears as a passing train and adds even more life to the railway world.

This title also introduces the series’ first-ever Hyper Real Texture Building feature, making the buildings and cityscape look more detailed, immersive, and visually impressive than ever before.

And if you want to dive deeper into the world of the line, the included Setting Materials Collection lets you discover the history and background of the Big Edo Line.

Drive, watch, and explore.
A compact train game packed with charm for railway fans and casual players alike!
70010000122145.intro: Take the controls of the Big Edo Line and enjoy a compact yet exciting train-driving experience!
70010000122145.name: Train Plus mini 1

70050000068685.description:
This Battle Pass is seasonal content that introduces new rewards with each season.

By playing and leveling up, you can unlock rewards from the currently active season’s “Nexus Battle Pass.” The exclusive items you earn can be used and exchanged for various customization items.

Five new themes and five characters are included:

• [Haunted Land] Lilith Noctra
• [Victorize Territory]  Isolde Vayne
• [Fluctus Union] Unit-77 “KIRN”
• [Sacred Ring Continent] Rafael Dorne
• [Arena Zone] Sera Veloce

Content included (one set per character):

• Emote
• Battle UI
• Player Icon
• Battle Background
• Loading Screen Background
• Battle BGM

The full version of “SHIKA-Q” is required to play.
This Battle Pass is included in “SHIKA-Q Nexus Edition,” “SHIKA-Q Deluxe Edition,” and the “Battle Pass Set.” Please be careful to avoid duplicate purchases.
70050000068685.name: Nexus Battle Pass

70050000068686.name: Premium Battle Pass

70050000071296.description: A paid upgrade pack that allows you to upgrade the Nintendo Switch™ version of Demon Castle Story to the Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition of Demon Castle Story – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition.
70050000071296.name: Demon Castle Story Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70050000071341.description:
Various custom items usable in SHIKA-Q will be granted free of charge as a pre-order bonus.

Contents
■ Mark of the Pioneer[Blue]_PIcon
■ Mark of the Pioneer[Red]_PIcon
■ Wind Racer
■ Founding Challenger
70050000071341.name: Pre-Order Bonus

70070000033225.description:
This bundle includes the full version of “SHIKA-Q” along with the “Nexus Battle Pass,” which grants access to exclusive rewards.

Engage in ultra-fast competitive puzzle battles on a 10×10 board, where creating Links and making split-second decisions determine victory. The “Nexus Battle Pass” adds season-exclusive customization items, bringing additional style and personality to your matches.

Collect limited-time rewards this season and experience the world of “SHIKA-Q” on a deeper level.

Content
■ Full Game
■ Nexus Battle Pass

Game Features
■ Strategy ×Super Speed × Competitive Play (1–2 Players)

Connect Links on a 10×10 board as offense and defense unfold in real time. Instant decisions determine victory.

Custom settings allow players to adjust the balance between speed and strategy—from slower, thought-focused matches to ultra-high-speed battles.

In addition to Offline Versus, the game also supports Online Battles and Ranked Matches, where split-second judgment determines the winner against players worldwide.

■ Challenge Mode (Single-Player)

A world-ranking-supported solo mode fully synchronized with music.

As stages progress, both the music and gameplay evolve. Manage your health, balance offense and defense, clear all 99 stages, and aim for a high score.

Unlike Versus Mode, this mode emphasizes discovering the optimal solution for each situation.

■ Characters, Worldbuilding & Customization

A diverse cast of characters enhances the competitive experience through unique themes and presentation.

Customize UI design, music, emotes, loading screens, wallpapers, icons, and more to personalize your matches.

Each theme includes dedicated character songs, deepening both musical and narrative immersion.

Tailor the atmosphere to your playstyle and express yourself through battle presentation.

■ DLC Battle Pass – Expanding the Online Experience

The DLC Battle Pass unlocks rewards progressively through mission completion.

It includes premium customization content such as UI designs, music, emotes, loading screens, wallpapers, and icons—enhancing the competitive experience.

The more you play, the more your presentation evolves. Your progress remains visible, supporting a long-term online experience built on growth and achievement.

※ The “SHIKA-Q” full game and the “Nexus Battle Pass” are also sold separately.
※ The full game is included in the “Premium Edition” and “Deluxe Edition,” and the “Nexus Battle Pass” is included in the “Deluxe Edition” and the “Battle Pass Set.” Please be careful not to purchase duplicates.
70070000033225.name: SHIKA-Q Nexus Edition
